title: Approve or block release: AI-assisted invoice approval and refund workflow
description: Sentinel QA scored this release 96/100 and returned BLOCK_RELEASE_PENDING_HUMAN_REVIEW.
recommendedAction: Review failed evidence, approve a fix plan, or explicitly override the release gate.

title: Review failed test SQA-001-PAYMENT
description: Checkout retry produced two invoice records for one approved payment.
recommendedAction: Block release and create a human review task in UiPath Action Center.
